title: Senior AI ML Engineer
company_focus: Healthcare technology and services improving health outcomes
description:
Requisition Number: 2352442 Optum is a global organization
that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of
people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team
will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people
with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they
need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture
guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits
and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on
the communities we serve as you help us advance health
optimization on a global scale. Join us to start Caring.
Connecting. Growing together. Role Expectation: Ownership +
Team Leadership Primary Responsibilities:

- Own end-to-end delivery of AI/ML products and platforms
- Translate complex business problems into scalable AI/ML
  solutions
- Architect ML systems including data, models, and deployment
  layers
- Lead and mentor a team of AI/ML engineers
- Coordinate cross-functionally with product, data, and
  engineering teams
- Define best practices for model development, MLOps, and
  governance
- Drive reliability, scalability, and business impact of AI
  solutions
- Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment
  contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all
  directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or
  re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams
  and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of
  work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work
  arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to
  the changing business environment). The Company may adopt,
  vary or rescind these policies and directives in its
  absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or
  otherwise) on its ability to do so

Required Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in Engineering (Master's preferred)
- 8+ years of hands-on AI/ML experience
- Proven track record of delivering AI products and leading
  teams

Key Skills:

- Deep expertise in ML/DL, model architecture, and
  optimization
- Solid system and ML solution design skills
- Proven experience in production-grade AI systems
- Leadership, mentoring, and delivery ownership
- MLOps and cloud-native ML architecture
- Stakeholder communication and execution focus

At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live
healthier lives and make the health system work better for
everyone. We believe everyone-of every race, gender,
sexuality, age, location and income-deserves the opportunity
to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are
still far too many barriers to good health which are
disproportionately experienced by people of color,
historically marginalized groups and those with lower
incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the
environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that
addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes -
an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.
responsibilities: Own end-to-end delivery of AI/ML products and platforms
Translate complex business problems into scalable AI/ML solutions
Architect ML systems including data, models, and deployment layers
Lead and mentor a team of AI/ML engineers
Coordinate cross-functionally with product, data, and engineering teams
Define best practices for model development, MLOps, and governance
Drive reliability, scalability, and business impact of AI solutions
use_cases: Health outcome optimization through AI/ML solutions
Connecting people with care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources
Scalable AI/ML solutions for complex healthcare business problems
Production-grade AI systems for health optimization at global scale
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves owning end-to-end delivery of AI/ML
products, architecting ML systems (data, models, deployment
layers), and defining best practices for model development
and MLOps. The position requires 8+ years of hands-on AI/ML
experience and deep expertise in ML/DL model architecture
and optimization, clearly placing it as directly building
and deploying AI/ML systems.
